# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources

  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging-sqlserver
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Server

  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging-appdb
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Database

  administratorLogin:
    type: string
    defaultValue: sqladmin
    metadata:
      description: Administrator login for SQL Server

  administratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
    defaultValue: "AzureSQL2024!"
    metadata:
      description: Administrator password for SQL Server

  databaseSku:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - S0
      - S1
      - S2
      - S3
      - P1
      - P2
    metadata:
      description: The SKU/tier of the SQL Database

  databaseMaxSizeBytes:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2147483648
    metadata:
      description: Max size of the database in bytes (default 2GB)

  devIpAddresses:
    type: array
    defaultValue:
      - name: DevTeam-Lead
        startIp: 203.0.113.10
        endIp: 203.0.113.10
      - name: DevTeam-Member1
        startIp: 203.0.113.20
        endIp: 203.0.113.20
      - name: DevTeam-Member2
        startIp: 203.0.113.30
        endIp: 203.0.113.30
      - name: DevOffice-Range
        startIp: 198.51.100.0
        endIp: 198.51.100.255
    metadata:
      description: List of developer IP addresses to allow through the firewall

  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging
    allowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - production
    metadata:
      description: Environment name for tagging

variables:
  sqlServerFullName: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  tags:
    environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
    purpose: development-testing
    managedBy: arm-template

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[variables('sqlServerFullName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags: "[variables('tags')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('administratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags: "[variables('tags')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))]"
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('databaseSku')]"
      tier: "[if(equals(parameters('databaseSku'), 'Basic'), 'Basic', if(contains(parameters('databaseSku'), 'S'), 'Standard', 'Premium'))]"
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: "[parameters('databaseMaxSizeBytes')]"
      zoneRedundant: false
      readScale: Disabled
      requestedBackupStorageRedundancy: Local

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/AllowAllAzureServices')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"
      endIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/', parameters('devIpAddresses')[copyIndex()].name)]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))]"
    copy:
      name: firewallRulesCopy
      count: "[length(parameters('devIpAddresses'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddresses')[copyIndex()].startIp]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddresses')[copyIndex()].endIp]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/connectionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))]"
    properties:
      connectionType: Default

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      retentionDays: 30
      isAzureMonitorTargetEnabled: true

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/securityAlertPolicies
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/Default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings', variables('sqlServerFullName'), 'default')]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      retentionDays: 30

outputs:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('sqlServerFullName')]"

  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"

  databaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"

  connectionString:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('administratorLogin'), ';Password=', parameters('administratorLoginPassword'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"

  resourceId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', variables('sqlServerFullName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
